subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-04-07 in Bahji
subcodes.first_line: When His Holiness the Exalted One was in grave peril, all eyes were fixed upon the Blessed Beauty. Therefore Áqá Mírzá 'Abdu'l-Karím-i-Qazvíní [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: وقتی که حضرت اعلی در خطر عظیم بودند انظار همه متوجه به جمال مبارک بود.  لهذا آقا میرزا عبدالکریم قزوینی
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @rejection, opposition and persecution
